sectionsUnavailable: Personal heart-health nutrition model output, food-score model output, clinical labs, blood pressure, diet history, medication list, and clinician review are not supplied.
A calibrated ASCVD or cardiovascular polygenic risk model with clinical and ancestry applicability metadata is not supplied.
The GenoPalate sample rows are observed sample-report structure only and are not local personal recommendations.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: A derived AG call is available for LPA rs10455872. This is cardiovascular genetics context only and does not measure lipoprotein(a) level.
resultRows.description: Lipoprotein(a) status requires blood testing and clinical review; this row only records the supplied marker context.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: This marker can be reported as LPA context, but the report cannot say whether lipoprotein(a) is high without a blood test and clinical review.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: A derived AG call is available for a 9p21 cardiovascular association marker. This marker is not used alone to diagnose heart disease or estimate personal risk.
resultRows.description: Common cardiovascular risk is multifactorial and cannot be determined from one association marker.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Common heart-disease risk is multifactorial, so a single marker cannot determine whether someone has or will develop cardiovascular disease.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: A comprehensive familial hypercholesterolemia pathogenic-variant screen, LDL cholesterol values, family history, physical findings, and clinician diagnosis are unavailable in this fixture.
resultRows.description: This fixture does not include the clinical or genetic evidence needed to diagnose or rule out familial hypercholesterolemia.
resultRows.sourceLabel: CDC About Familial Hypercholesterolemia; MedlinePlus familial hypercholesterolemia
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: This local package cannot diagnose familial hypercholesterolemia or rule it out because the required clinical and variant-screening evidence is not present.

resultRows.item: Calibrated cardiovascular and heart-health nutrition models
resultRows.geneticAnalysis: The fixture does not include calibrated ASCVD, cardiovascular PRS, heart-health nutrition, or food-score models, and it omits clinical risk factors and personal recommendation context.
resultRows.description: The sample PDF can show output structure, but it does not supply a validated personal model for this fixture.
resultRows.sourceLabel: NHGRI overview of polygenic risk scores; MedlinePlus complex disorders
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: The report can summarize supplied genetic context and observed sample-report structure, but it cannot estimate personal heart, cholesterol, blood-pressure, nutrition, or food-score results from this fixture.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Sample summary lists total fat 29-37% of daily calories, omega-3 1,100 mg/day, omega-6 7-9% of daily calories, saturated fat below 10% of daily calories, carbohydrates 57-65% of daily calories, folate 400 micrograms/day, potassium above 4,100 mg/day, and sodium 1,500-2,300 mg/day.
resultRows.description: The public sample summary page color-codes heart-health nutrition recommendations and ties them to HDL cholesterol and triglyceride levels.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: The public sample summary page color-codes heart-health nutrition recommendations and ties them to HDL cholesterol and triglyceride levels.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: The sample explains that GenoPalate starts with NIH nutrition guidelines, refines ranges with DNA plus personal factors, and scores foods from 0 to 100 using nutrient content, nutrient density, and DNA personalization.
resultRows.description: The public sample includes method pages describing nutrition recommendation calculation and food scoring before nutrient-specific result pages.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: The public sample includes method pages describing nutrition recommendation calculation and food scoring before nutrient-specific result pages.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Sample result: more likely to increase HDL cholesterol and decrease triglyceride levels when consuming a moderately high-total fat intake; recommendation 29-37% of daily calories and 50-61 grams per day.
resultRows.description: The sample gene table shows CETP GP000024 CC, FAAH GP000013 CC, ACE GP000019 AG, LIPC GP000015 CC, and APOA5 GP000049 with no detected genotype.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: The sample gene table shows CETP GP000024 CC, FAAH GP000013 CC, ACE GP000019 AG, LIPC GP000015 CC, and APOA5 GP000049 with no detected genotype.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Sample result: normal omega-3 needs; recommendation 1,100 milligrams per day.
resultRows.description: The sample gene table shows FADS1 GP000032 CC and says the genotype aligns with typical dietary guidelines.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: The sample gene table shows FADS1 GP000032 CC and says the genotype aligns with typical dietary guidelines.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Sample result: more likely to increase HDL cholesterol when consuming a high-omega-6 fatty-acid intake; recommendation 7-9% of daily calories and 11-14 grams per day.
resultRows.description: The sample gene table shows FADS1 GP000032 CC for high-omega-6 HDL context and TCF7L2 GP000005 CC aligned with typical dietary guidelines.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: The sample gene table shows FADS1 GP000032 CC for high-omega-6 HDL context and TCF7L2 GP000005 CC aligned with typical dietary guidelines.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Sample result: normal saturated fat needs; recommendation below 10% of daily calories and below 17 grams per day.
resultRows.description: The sample gene table shows ACE GP000019 AG and says the genotype aligns with typical dietary guidelines.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: The sample gene table shows ACE GP000019 AG and says the genotype aligns with typical dietary guidelines.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Sample result: high-total carbohydrate intake; recommendation 57-65% of daily calories and 215-241 grams per day.
resultRows.description: The sample gene table shows MMAB GP000004 with no detected genotype and recommends nutrient-dense carbohydrate sources.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: The sample gene table shows MMAB GP000004 with no detected genotype and recommends nutrient-dense carbohydrate sources.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Sample result: normal folate needs; recommendation 400 micrograms per day.
resultRows.description: The sample gene table shows MTHFR GP000052 GG and says the genotype aligns with typical dietary guidelines.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: The sample gene table shows MTHFR GP000052 GG and says the genotype aligns with typical dietary guidelines.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Sample result: moderately high-potassium intake; recommendation above 4,100 milligrams per day.
resultRows.description: The sample gene table shows ADIPOQ GP000062 with no detected genotype and names high-potassium food examples.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: The sample gene table shows ADIPOQ GP000062 with no detected genotype and names high-potassium food examples.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Sample result: normal sodium needs; recommendation 1,500-2,300 milligrams per day.
resultRows.description: The sample names ADIPOQ and AGT as sodium-related genes, shows one typical-guideline row with OCR-noisy marker text, and shows AGT GP000056 with no detected genotype.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: The sample names ADIPOQ and AGT as sodium-related genes, shows one typical-guideline row with OCR-noisy marker text, and shows AGT GP000056 with no detected genotype.

riskContext.plainEnglishMeaning: Cardiovascular and heart-health nutrition context depends on genetics plus lipid labs, lipoprotein(a), blood pressure, diabetes, smoking, age, sex, family history, diet, medications, lifestyle, environment, and clinical care.
unsupportedClaims: high cholesterol or high lipoprotein(a) diagnosis
diet, supplement, medication, lab-test, imaging, exercise, procedure, or treatment recommendation
riskContext.professionalReview: A clinician or qualified nutrition professional can interpret cardiovascular genetics together with labs, blood pressure, medical history, diet, medications, age, sex, ancestry, and other health information.

references.title: NHGRI overview of polygenic risk scores

genotypeSummary.observedValue: pathogenic-variant screen, LDL cholesterol values, family history, physical findings, and clinician diagnosis unavailable in this fixture

calibrated heart-health nutrition model, food-score model, ASCVD or cardiovascular polygenic risk score, ancestry applicability metadata, lipid labs, blood pressure, diabetes, smoking, medication, age/sex, diet, exercise, supplement, and personal recommendation context unavailable in this fixture

genotypeSummary.effect: Sample total-fat row says this genotype is linked to increased HDL cholesterol and decreased triglycerides on a high-fat intake.
Sample total-fat row says this genotype is linked to decreased triglyceride levels on a low-fat intake.
Sample total-fat and saturated-fat rows say this genotype aligns with typical dietary guidelines.
Sample total-fat row says this genotype aligns with typical dietary guidelines.
Sample total-fat row says the genotype could not be detected from the provided sample file.
Sample omega-3 row says this genotype aligns with typical dietary guidelines; sample omega-6 row links it to increased HDL cholesterol on high-omega-6 fatty-acid intake.
Sample omega-6 row says this genotype aligns with typical dietary guidelines.
Sample carbohydrate row says the genotype could not be detected from the provided sample file.
Sample folate row says this genotype aligns with typical dietary guidelines.
Sample potassium row says the genotype could not be detected from the provided sample file.
Sample sodium row appears to show a typical-guideline genotype row, but the marker ID text is not reliably readable in OCR.
Sample sodium row says the genotype could not be detected from the provided sample file.

missingInputs: Personal GenoPalate heart-health nutrition model output
LDL cholesterol, ApoB, lipoprotein(a), blood pressure, diabetes, smoking, medication, diet, age, sex, family-history, symptom, and clinician-confirmed context
Calibrated ASCVD or cardiovascular polygenic risk model
uncertainty: No calibrated probability model is supplied for this local package.
The observed sample rows are examples of report format and must not be interpreted as the user's nutrient targets or food scores.
limitations: This validation result uses derived evidence only; raw genome data is not included.
The package cannot diagnose familial hypercholesterolemia, coronary artery disease, high cholesterol, high lipoprotein(a), hypertension, nutrient deficiency, heart attack, or stroke.
The package does not recommend medication, supplements, procedures, lab tests, imaging, genetic testing decisions, diet changes, exercise plans, food purchases, or treatment changes.
The public sample PDF demonstrates report shape and example rows, not this user-specific nutrition, food-score, or cardiovascular-risk result.
